flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mercy University rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.8k → $16.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mercy University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.7k → $22.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mercy University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mercy University fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($24.0k → $19.6k).
